TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == komaw, kumaw == u sulit nu Hulam: ŚŹįÁĀ£šļĒŤĎČśĚĺ kumaw sa, u tabakiay a kilang, takalaw maka 15-25m. izaw tu ku tademaw paluma' ku kumaw, sapaazihay a kilang. uyniyan a kilang sa, u Taywanay a kilang. silima a papah mahiza ku zunem saca ceka. sisa u ngangan nu Hulam sa, lima-papah a kilang saca lima-zunem a kilang satu. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika Pinus morrisonicola(Taiwan white pine; Chinese: ŚŹįśĻĺšļĒťíąśĚĺ; pinyin: taiwan wuzhensong; literally: "Taiwan five-needle pine"), is a species of conifer in the Pinaceae family. It is a large tree, up to 15‚Äď25 m (49‚Äď82 ft) high and 1.2 m (4 ft) in diameter. The trunk is often crooked. Needles are in bundles of five. Mature cones are large, to 10 cm long and 4‚Äď5 cm (1.6‚Äď2.0 in) in diameter.
S.PHON: == komaw, kumaw == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***** kumaw sa, u tabakiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, takar~…ĺaw maka **-**m. izaw tu ku tad…ômaw par~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ku kumaw, sapaazińßaj a kir~…ĺaŇč. ujnijan a kir~…ĺaŇč sa, u tajwanaj a kir~…ĺaŇč. sir~…ĺima a papańß mańßiza ku zun…ôm sa ¶a ¶…ôka. sisa u ŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺam sa, r~…ĺima-papańß a kir~…ĺaŇč sa ¶a r~…ĺima-zun…ôm a kir~…ĺaŇč satu. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika pinus morrisoni ¶or~…ĺa(taiwan wńßit…ô pin…ô; ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: *****; pinjin: taiwan wuzńß…ônsoŇč; r~…ĺit…ôrar~…ĺr~…ĺj: "taiwan fi*…ô-n…ô…ôdr~…ĺ…ô pin…ô"), is a sp…ô ¶i…ôs of ¶onif…ôr in tńß…ô pina ¶…ôa…ô famir~…ĺj. it is a r~…ĺarg…ô tr…ô…ô, up to ***** m (***** ft) ńßigńß and *.* m (* ft) in diam…ôt…ôr. tńß…ô trunk is oft…ôn ¶rook…ôd. n…ô…ôdr~…ĺ…ôs ar…ô in bundr~…ĺ…ôs of fi*…ô. matur…ô ¶on…ôs ar…ô r~…ĺarg…ô, to ** ¶m r~…ĺoŇč and *** ¶m (*.***.* in) in diam…ôt…ôr.
S.FORM: == komaw, kumaw == u sulit nu Hulam: ŚŹįÁĀ£šļĒŤĎČśĚĺ kumaw sa, u tabakiay a kilang, takalaw maka 15-25m. izaw tu ku tademaw paluma' ku kumaw, sapaazihay a kilang. uyniyan a kilang sa, u Taywanay a kilang. silima a papah mahiza ku zunem saca ceka. sisa u ngangan nu Hulam sa, lima-papah a kilang saca lima-zunem a kilang satu. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika Pinus morrisonicola(Taiwan white pine; Chinese: ŚŹįśĻĺšļĒťíąśĚĺ; pinyin: taiwan wuzhensong; literally: "Taiwan five-needle pine"), is a species of conifer in the Pinaceae family. It is a large tree, up to 15‚Äď25 m (49‚Äď82 ft) high and 1.2 m (4 ft) in diameter. The trunk is often crooked. Needles are in bundles of five. Mature cones are large, to 10 cm long and 4‚Äď5 cm (1.6‚Äď2.0 in) in diameter.
S.PHON: == komaw, kumaw == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***** kumaw sa, u tabakiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, takar~…ĺaw maka **-**m. izaw tu ku tad…ômaw par~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ku kumaw, sapaazińßaj a kir~…ĺaŇč. ujnijan a kir~…ĺaŇč sa, u tajwanaj a kir~…ĺaŇč. sir~…ĺima a papańß mańßiza ku zun…ôm sa ¶a ¶…ôka. sisa u ŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺam sa, r~…ĺima-papańß a kir~…ĺaŇč sa ¶a r~…ĺima-zun…ôm a kir~…ĺaŇč satu. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika pinus morrisoni ¶or~…ĺa(taiwan wńßit…ô pin…ô; ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: *****; pinjin: taiwan wuzńß…ônsoŇč; r~…ĺit…ôrar~…ĺr~…ĺj: "taiwan fi*…ô-n…ô…ôdr~…ĺ…ô pin…ô"), is a sp…ô ¶i…ôs of ¶onif…ôr in tńß…ô pina ¶…ôa…ô famir~…ĺj. it is a r~…ĺarg…ô tr…ô…ô, up to ***** m (***** ft) ńßigńß and *.* m (* ft) in diam…ôt…ôr. tńß…ô trunk is oft…ôn ¶rook…ôd. n…ô…ôdr~…ĺ…ôs ar…ô in bundr~…ĺ…ôs of fi*…ô. matur…ô ¶on…ôs ar…ô r~…ĺarg…ô, to ** ¶m r~…ĺoŇč and *** ¶m (*.***.* in) in diam…ôt…ôr.
